detailed_description.heading: Wide-Angle AI Camera
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Camera G6 180 Black (UVC-G6-180-B) is a high-performance indoor/outdoor surveillance solution engineered to deliver seamless panoramic monitoring with uncompromising image quality. Equipped with a dual-sensor system and offering 16MP resolution (7680 × 2160, 3.5:1 aspect ratio) at up to 20 FPS, the camera captures ultra-wide scenes with exceptional clarity and detail. Its dual 1/1.8" 8MP sensors combined with two fixed focal length lenses provide true dual 4K imaging and a continuous 180° horizontal field of view with a 56.7° vertical angle, eliminating blind spots in corridors, entrances, retail floors, parking areas, and perimeter zones.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Recognition System
detailed_description.text: At the core of the UVC-G6-180-B is a powerful Multi-TOPS AI Engine powered by a quad-core Arm® Cortex®-A53 processor, delivering advanced real-time analytics directly on the device. This architecture enables intelligent event detection without relying solely on external servers, reducing latency and optimizing bandwidth usage. The camera supports Face Recognition and License Plate Recognition, making it suitable for access control zones, gated entries, parking facilities, and retail analytics. Its AI capabilities also include Smart Detections for People, Vehicles, and Animals, allowing precise alert filtering and minimizing false notifications. With a maximum power consumption of 15W and support for PoE+ (37–57V DC), the camera ensures reliable performance over a single Ethernet cable. Advanced image processing controls allow precise tuning of color, brightness, sharpness, contrast, white balance, and exposure, along with professional-grade enhancements such as HDR, 2DNR, 3DNR, motion-based noise reduction, masking, and customizable text overlays. This ensures optimal visibility across diverse lighting conditions. For low-light environments, the integrated IR LED illumination and automatic IR cut filter enable clear night surveillance at distances up to 20 meters. The camera intelligently transitions to night mode, maintaining detailed footage even in complete darkness. Designed for seamless integration into the UniFi Protect application suite, the G6 180 centralizes management, monitoring, and storage within a professional security ecosystem, making it ideal for enterprise, commercial, and high-traffic installations requiring panoramic coverage and advanced image performance.

detailed_description.heading: Rugged Outdoor Design
detailed_description.text: Built for demanding environments, the UVC-G6-180-B features a robust enclosure constructed from aluminum alloy and polycarbonate, ensuring durability while maintaining a refined appearance. The mounting components are made of polycarbonate and stainless steel, providing additional strength and corrosion resistance. With an IP66 weatherproof rating, the camera is fully protected against dust ingress and powerful water jets, making it suitable for outdoor deployment in harsh conditions. Its IK04 tamper resistance rating adds protection against mechanical impact, enhancing reliability in public or exposed installations. Weighing 839 g, the camera offers a stable and secure mounting profile. Multiple installation options provide flexibility for various deployment scenarios. Included mounting accessories support ceiling, pole, wedge mount, and pan adapter configurations, while optional accessories expand compatibility to camera junction boxes, arm mounts, dual mounts, and gang box mounting plates. The wide supported voltage range and PoE+ power method simplify infrastructure planning, reducing the need for separate power lines. Its streamlined design allows discreet installation while still delivering full panoramic coverage. Whether installed in commercial facilities, educational institutions, logistics centers, or large residential properties, the G6 180 Black combines rugged durability, professional mounting versatility, and advanced panoramic imaging to deliver comprehensive surveillance coverage with minimal infrastructure complexity.
